sections.title: Opening Fiction
sections.notes: Sets the emotional tone of Toreador existence through a focused story of obsession, beauty, and decay.

sections.title: Clan History
sections.notes: Outlines Toreador myths of origin and their role in mortal cultural evolution from antiquity to the modern night.

sections.title: Culture and Practices
sections.notes: Describes Toreador social customs, salons, artistic fixations, and internal expectations of taste and comportment.

sections.title: Philosophy and Worldview
sections.notes: Explores how Toreador justify their obsession with beauty and their role as curators of meaning in an eternal night.

sections.title: Factions and Politics
sections.notes: Covers subgroups within the clan and how they leverage art, reputation, and Elysium to influence Camarilla power structures.

sections.title: Relations With Other Clans
sections.notes: Summarizes Toreador attitudes toward other clans and how those clans stereotype or exploit Toreador.

sections.title: Character Creation Notes
sections.notes: Provides guidance on building Toreador characters, including concept suggestions and mechanical emphases.

sections.title: Archetypes and Templates
sections.notes: Lists prebuilt Toreador concepts and example characters illustrating common clan roles.

sections.title: Storyteller Advice
sections.notes: Offers direction for using Toreador in chronicles, including how to center stories around art, reputation, and emotional stakes.
